LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF RONALD BROOKS' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER ANSWERS TO JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTEROGGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS - THE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION TO COMPEL FORM INTERROGATORY 14.2 IS DENIED AS THE FURTHER AMENDED RESPONSES APPEAR TO BE COMPLIANT. THE MOTION TO COMPEL FORM INTERROGATORY 15.1 IS GRANTED. WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS, THE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES RELATED TO EACH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE PLED. THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $660.00 IS GRANTED. PAYMENT SHALL BE MADE WITHIN THIRTY (30) DAYS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976

Mtn To Compel Further Answers To Judicial Council Form Interoggs
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LAURA LICCARDO OF THE BRADY LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 459-7300 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RONALD BROOKS' Motion To Compel Further Answers To Judicial Council Form Interoggatories and request for sanctions - The plaintiff's motion is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The motion to compel form interrogatory 14.2 is denied as the further amended responses appear to be compliant. The motion to compel form interrogatory 15.1 is GRANTED. Within ten (10) days, the defendant is ordered to provide full and complete responses related to each affirmative defense pled. The plaintiff's request for sanctions in the amount of $660.00 is GRANTED. Payment shall be made within thirty (30) days. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

David Y. Wong, Esq. of Law Office of Brian R. McClellan (510-457-9928) for Defendants and opposing party Kobe Royo and Afsaneh Royo.

Defendant's Counsel does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem. Argued.
